name: Danger! Disturbance! Disorder!
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>激</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>未</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>域</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your "Danger!" monster is destroyed by battle with an opponent's monster: You can destroy that opponent's monster. You can banish 3 "Danger!" Spells/Traps with different names from your GY; destroy all cards on the field, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except "Danger!" monsters. You can only use this effect of "Danger! Disturbance! Disorder!" once per turn.
eff: When your "Danger!" monster is destroyed by battle with an opponent's monster: You can destroy that opponent's monster. You can banish 3 "Danger!" Spells/Traps with different names from your GY; destroy all cards on the field, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except "Danger!" monsters. You can only use this effect of "Danger! Disturbance! Disorder!" once per turn.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys battling monster at the end of the Damage Step
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
